---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the Oscar Broome Revenue System
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### 📝 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

### 🎯 Problem Statement
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. -->
<!-- Example: I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

### 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->

### 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

### 📊 Use Case
<!-- Describe how this feature would be used -->
<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? -->

### 🎨 Mockups/Examples
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other systems -->

### 📈 Expected Benefits
<!-- What benefits would this feature provide? -->
- [ ] Improved performance
- [ ] Better user experience
- [ ] Enhanced security
- [ ] Cost reduction
- [ ] Increased revenue
- [ ] Other: ___________

### 🔧 Technical Considerations
<!-- Any technical details or constraints to consider? -->

### 📅 Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->
- [ ] Critical - Blocking current work
- [ ] High - Needed soon
- [ ] Medium - Would be nice to have
- [ ] Low - Future enhancement

### 🔗 Related Issues/Features
<!-- Link any related issues or features -->
- Related to #

### ✨ Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or information about the feature request here -->

### ☑️ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I have provided sufficient detail
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)

---
**Note**: Feature requests are reviewed regularly. Popular requests (based on 👍 reactions) are prioritized for implementation.
